THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF P.W. STEPHENS ENVIRONMENTAL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FALLON, ROBERT $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,160.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
